videos.title: How to Handle Difficult Social Situations with Confidence

sentences.english_sentence: One thing led to another, and before I knew it we'd been talking for three hours.
sentences.chinese_meaning: 话赶话，不知不觉就聊了三个小时。
sentences.usage_scene: 描述聊天的自然延续，不知不觉时间就过去了。
sentences.expression_function: 描述自然而然发生的事
sentences.visual_hint: 金色螺旋纹晶体，像两股对话不断缠绕延伸

sentences.english_sentence: If you were in my shoes, what would you do?
sentences.usage_scene: 征求建议时让对方换位思考。
sentences.visual_hint: 蓝色镜像晶体，左右两半互相映照

sentences.english_sentence: I just went with the flow and ended up having a great time.
sentences.chinese_meaning: 我就顺其自然，结果玩得很开心。
sentences.usage_scene: 被问到计划时，表达自己没刻意安排但体验不错。
sentences.visual_hint: 流水曲线纹理的冰蓝色晶体，像自然流淌的对话

videos.title: Giving Honest Feedback Without Being Rude

sentences.english_sentence: I can't quite put my finger on it, but something feels off.
sentences.chinese_meaning: 我说不上来，但总觉得哪里不太对。
sentences.usage_scene: 感觉到不对劲但说不清具体是什么。
sentences.visual_hint: 半透明紫色晶体，内部有雾气涌动

sentences.crystal_name: 诚实和粗鲁之间走钢丝
sentences.english_sentence: You're walking a fine line between being honest and being rude.
sentences.chinese_meaning: 你正在诚实和粗鲁之间走钢丝。
sentences.usage_scene: 提醒对方注意分寸、不要越界。
sentences.visual_hint: 琥珀色纤细晶体，一条亮线从中间贯穿

sentences.english_sentence: Don't pass the buck — this was your call from the start.
sentences.chinese_meaning: 别甩锅，这从一开始就是你的决定。
sentences.usage_scene: 当对方推卸责任时，直接指出事实。
sentences.visual_hint: 双色拼接晶体，一半暗红一半铁灰

sentences.english_sentence: This isn't personal — I'm just pointing out what needs to change.
sentences.chinese_meaning: 这不是针对你个人，我只是指出需要改进的地方。
sentences.usage_scene: 给反馈前先铺垫，降低对方的防御心。
sentences.visual_hint: 淡蓝色透明晶体，内部有柔和的分隔线

videos.title: Managing Emotions and Stress at Work

sentences.english_sentence: Let me sleep on it and get back to you tomorrow.
sentences.chinese_meaning: 让我晚上再想想，明天给你答复。
sentences.usage_scene: 需要时间考虑不愿意当场拍板。
sentences.visual_hint: 冰白色枕形晶体，中间有一颗暗色内核

sentences.english_sentence: I've been on edge all day waiting for their decision.
sentences.chinese_meaning: 我这一整天都坐立不安，等着他们的决定。
sentences.usage_scene: 描述等待重要结果时的焦虑状态。
sentences.visual_hint: 琥珀色震颤晶体，内部光点不稳定地跳动

sentences.english_sentence: There's no need to be defensive — I'm just trying to understand.
sentences.chinese_meaning: 别急着防御，我只是想弄清楚。
sentences.usage_scene: 对方反应过激时，用这句话降低火药味。
sentences.expression_function: 安抚对方情绪、降低防御
sentences.visual_hint: 柔粉色圆润晶体，表面有细密绒毛状纹理
